title: DevAudit Cross-Repo Dispatch Payload Contract
description: Schemas for repository_dispatch payloads sent by the DevAudit portal and consumed by DevAudit-Installer CI workflows. Both repos validate against this file to prevent silent drift (#571 Gap 1).

release-approved.description: Sent by the portal when a release is approved at UAT. Triggers check-release-approval.yml in the consumer repo to post a check run against the approved SHA.

release_pr.description: The PR number associated with the release, or null if not applicable

approved_sha.description: The Git SHA approved by the reviewer. Used to post a check run against the correct commit. Null when the approval did not capture a SHA (#570 fixed this being missing).

release-closed.description: Sent by the portal when a release advances to 'released' status. Triggers close-out-release.yml in the consumer repo to reconcile the release branch.

release_pr.description: The PR number associated with the release, or null if not applicable

evidence-contract-updated.description: Sent by the portal when the evidence-types contract is updated. Triggers evidence-contract-check.yml in the DevAudit-Installer repo to verify CI templates still match.

sha.description: The Git SHA of the contract update commit

message.description: Human-readable summary of the contract change
